message:
test(metrics): add 11 DB persistence tests, push coverage 75.8% → 93.4% (bd-3ivmn)

Exercise the SQLite persistence path of the metrics Collector which was
previously at 0% coverage.  All Record* functions, SaveSnapshot,
LoadSnapshot, CompareSnapshots round-trip, and full-cycle integration
are now tested against a real state.Store with proper FK setup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
